name: HWM Electronic Remote Water Meter
desc: Photoelectric infrared direct-reading remote water meter via M-Bus/RS485. No accumulated error, no continuous power required.
overview: The HWM Photo Series uses a non-contact photoelectric absolute encoder to read the mechanical counter directly, with no mechanical linkage drift. Data is transmitted via M-Bus bus concentrator or 4G/NB-IoT network. Ultra-low power draw — battery life exceeds 6 years. Fully sealed electronic section prevents corrosion. Compatible with hot water supply as well.

specs.label: Reading method
specs.value: Photoelectric direct reading (infrared non-contact dial scanning)

specs.label: Communication
specs.value: M-Bus / RS485; concentrator via 4G or NB-IoT for remote reading

features: Wired M-Bus/RS485 transmission: stable, reliable, safe data and power over bus
Non-contact photoelectric method reads meter disc barcode directly; reads and verifies in one pass
Electronic part does not contact the mechanical movement; no impact on original measurement accuracy
Real-time direct reading without creating readings on meter display; no additional power supply needed
Clean reading unaffected by water quality: meter face is specially sealed and separated
Always-on connected mode: power only needed at reading time; very low leakage and power consumption
